items.title: Microsoft’s (MSFT) Focus on Innovation Supports its Dividend Stability
items.description: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is included among the 11 Innovative Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is an American tech giant. The company developed Microsoft Windows, an operating system designed for personal computers. It was the first to provide a graphical user interface for IBM-compatible PCs, quickly rising to become the leading system in […]

items.title: Why IBM is an Innovative Dividend Stock for the Long Term
items.description: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is included among the 11 Innovative Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. The global technology company, which first gained attention for its punch card machines, successfully adapted to the rise of digital computers as they became the industry norm. items.title: Seagate's Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Improve Y/Y on Cloud Momentum
items.description: STX posts strong Q4 with EPS of $2.59 and 30% revenue growth, fueled by hyperscale cloud and AI-driven storage demand.

items.title: OpenLegacy Hub is now available in the new AWS Marketplace AI Agents and Tools category
items.description: OpenLegacy a leading provider of AI-driven, low-code/no-code legacy modernization solutions, today announced the availability of OpenLegacy Hub in the new AI Agents and Tools category of AWS Marketplace. Customers can now use AWS Marketplace to easily discover, buy, and deploy AI agents solutions, including OpenLegacy's advanced platform for modernizing mainframe and IBM i legacy systems, into modern cloud-based AI workflows using their AWS accounts accelerating agent and agentic workflow develo
